response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong TypeScript and leadership capabilities, he lacks the core requirement of 8+ years building AI-driven solutions. His AI experience appears limited to his most recent role, and his resume lacks mention of Python, vector databases, or RAG architectures, making him a poor fit for this specialized GenAI position.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years), including multiple Staff-level positions.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and Node.js, which aligns with part of the required tech stack.
Demonstrated technical leadership through founding an open-source platform and leading engineering workshops.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building production-grade AI solutions.
No demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, or RAG architectures.
AI and agentic workflow experience is limited to a single, very recent role.
